back: Software that performs tasks that normally require human intelligence. An umbrella term covering many techniques.
A subset of AI where systems learn patterns from examples instead of following hand-written rules.
Machine learning using large, layered neural networks. Excels at messy data like images, speech, and language.
Software loosely inspired by how brain cells connect. Layers build up from simple patterns (edges) to complex ones (faces).
AI that creates new content - text, images, code, music - instead of just classifying or predicting.
AI that is excellent at one specific task and helpless outside it. All AI you can use today is narrow.

front: What three ingredients enabled generative AI?
back: Huge amounts of data (the internet), huge computing power (modern chips), and a better learning recipe (the transformer, 2017).

front: Is AI conscious or 'understanding' like a human?
back: No. It is an extraordinarily good pattern machine - like a calculator, but for language and images instead of arithmetic.
